content.title: Welcome to Ascendancy PvE
content.text:
Crossplay • No Wipe • Friendly Community

Welcome Survivor!

Ascendancy PvE is designed for long-term progression without wipes.
Build your dream base, tame legendary creatures and enjoy an active, friendly community.

FEATURES

⭐ Crossplay
⭐ No Wipe
⭐ Active Admin Team
⭐ Friendly Community
⭐ Events & Giveaways
⭐ In-Game Shop
⭐ Discord Support

content.title: Server Rules
content.text:
✔ Respect all players.

✔ No griefing.

✔ No cheating or exploiting.

✔ Don't block important resource spawns.

✔ Build responsibly.

✔ Keep chat friendly.

✔ Follow admin instructions.

Breaking the rules may result in warnings or bans.

content.text:
XP x2

Increased Dino Weight

Crossplay Enabled
